item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Easy to Store, Easy to Use, Foldable, Outdoor Safe

about_item: PET CARRIER SPECIFICATIONS: The dog carriers for small dogs measures 20x13x13 inches, maximum load 33 lbs. Suitable for pets under 19*12*12 in size (cats up to 25 lbs, small dogs up to 22 lbs). It can be used as a fabric toy PET home. NOTE: Please measure your pet's body size before purchasing, you can't choose based on weight alone.

SUITABLE CAR TRAVEL: The cat carrier soft comes with a buckle that can be secure car seat belts, and hang the seat headrests using the shoulder straps, adding stability and safety to travel, perfect for road trips. A convenient storage pouch on the back of the cat bag allows you to store essentials during outings. For traveling, VET visits, picnics with pets such as cats, dogs, and rabbits. (NOTE:Not approved by airlines)

SAFE STRUCTURE: The cat travel carrier is secured with steel rings on both sides, and the top two sides each add an environmentally friendly fiberglass tube (removable), making the whole cat carriers more firm and solid. Pet carrier for cat built-in 2mm honeycomb board at the bottom + 4 non-slip feet, providing more secure external protection for pets.

PET TRAVEL CARRIER FABRIC: Waterproof oxford fabric and anti-scratch mesh fabric are combined, sturdy and durable with good breathability. Removable and easy-to-clean cushion: soft foam + velvet rabric + anti-slip clothand provides your pet with a smoother and more comfortable space to move.

EASY TO CARRY: The small dog carrier comes with adjustable shoulder straps and sturdy handles make it easy for you to carry puppy by hand and crossbody. Can also be fastened to your luggage. When not in use: the dog soft-sided carrier can be folded for storage, light weight and takes up little space. The cat carrier for 2 cats/kitten, pet travel bag for large cat, puppies, bunny and other animals.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier suitable for airplane travel, with one mentioning it passes TSA requirements. The carrier is well-made, comfortable, and fits under airplane seats with no issues. They appreciate its sturdiness, with one customer noting it holds up to 12-15lb cats, and the zippers work well. Customers consider it good value for money.

insights.title: Airplane-friendly
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier suitable for airplane travel and transporting cats, with one customer noting it passes airport requirements and another mentioning no issues with TSA.

examples.snippet: ...Met airline requirements and was easy to transport through airports.
This carrier was perfect for my babies. I bought two, left them open in my living room so they could go in and out before the trip....
We have 3 cats that we moved to Panama in Central America. It was easy to carry them and they were relaxed in the carriers. They felt safe....
...is a really well constructed pet carrier that's going to be perfect for traveling by air....

authors_reviews.title: Great deal and quality
authors_reviews.text: I was very pleased with the capacity and sturdiness of this cat backpack. It can hold up to a 12-15lb cat easily and has lots of room. The straps are sturdy and secure. Considering I got it on sale for $15, I’m very pleased with the quality and value of this product. I got the camo pattern since that had the deal, and it’s a good quality pattern. It’s got a cushioned bottom to keep the cat comfortable, and plenty of ventilation and visibility.
authors_reviews.author: MT D.

authors_reviews.title: Airline pet carrier
authors_reviews.text: Exactly what we were looking for to relocate our 15 year old kitty from CA to HI! Met airline requirements and was easy to transport through airports.
authors_reviews.author: Marie L

authors_reviews.title: Very impressed with the great quality!
authors_reviews.text: Had a hard time to find a carrier that meets the standard perfectly, so I was relieved when I found this! It’s well-made, I love the great quality of the zippers and the shoulder belt, and my cats comfortably fit in. Worth every penny, highly recommend! :)
authors_reviews.author: J

authors_reviews.title: Seems like a quality product but the wrong color was sent
authors_reviews.text: Seems adequate and well made, BUT they sent the wrong color and it was returned.
authors_reviews.author: AZterritory

authors_reviews.title: This is perfect for transporting a cat
authors_reviews.text: This is a really well constructed pet carrier that's going to be perfect for traveling by air. The dimensions are exactly the current requirements for Alaska Air and fits my 8 lb cat well. She's a small cat but has ample room inside the carrier.
authors_reviews.author: dontcallmepammy

authors_reviews.title: Great buy! And Sturdy!
authors_reviews.text: I got this in a super sale and it's perfect! It completely unzips and folds up. It's sturdy for my 10lb baby. It's a good buy!
authors_reviews.author: Spencer Moss

authors_reviews.title: Very Nice Dog Carrier
authors_reviews.text: This is a great dog carrier. I am impressed with the quality and value for money. It is very well made and also attractive. I’m very pleased with my purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Ok; not fantastic
authors_reviews.text: Nylon Zipper breaks easily. It passes the airport requirements.
authors_reviews.author: MargRing
